strategy.key_message: You're one of our most valued guests

generated_emails.subject: Welcome back to Luxury, Catherine
generated_emails.body:
Dear Catherine Jackson,

It's been 49 days since your last stay with us. We remember you celebrated your anniversary with us.

You're one of our most valued guests.

As a Regular guest who has spent $4,795.00 with us, we're offering you a special 25% discount on your next stay. Your preferred standard room is ready for you. Our dinner team can't wait to welcome you back.

Claim your exclusive offer

Warm regards,
Luxury Hotel Team

P.S. This exclusive offer is available for a limited time. Don't miss out!
